scenarios.current_claim: Create, open, read, close in one process without close-to-reopen reload
scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: Create relational SQLite session; open writable; read canonical state from tables; close releases ownership; optional persisted reopen subclaim remains InterfaceBehavior
scenarios.required_physical_operation: create with schema tx; open; SELECT canonical tables; close clears writer_ownership
scenarios.required_persisted_observation: session.db with relational canonical rows; writer_ownership NULL after close
scenarios.required_reopen_recovery_step: 2C: close handle, new adapter open read-only, oracle matches fixture
scenarios.required_oracle: independent expected from fixture, not adapter memory
scenarios.package_ownership: 2B implementation and unit test; 2C persisted reopen evidence
scenarios.prohibited_shortcut: compare(actual, actual); classify API flow as ProcessCrashRecovery

scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: ReviewLedger event persisted in review_ledger_events table across close and reopen
scenarios.required_physical_operation: BEGIN; INSERT ledger event; COMMIT; close; reopen; read tables
scenarios.required_persisted_observation: new row in review_ledger_events visible after reopen
scenarios.required_reopen_recovery_step: mandatory close and new adapter reopen before oracle
scenarios.required_oracle: independent expected mutation, not shared apply_command blind spot
scenarios.package_ownership: 2B unit test with reopen; 2C post-commit crash

scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: analysis_results row persisted across close and reopen
scenarios.required_physical_operation: BEGIN; INSERT analysis_results; COMMIT; close; reopen; read

scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: Reject stale ReviewLedgerHead with stale-precondition; no SQLite mutation
scenarios.required_physical_operation: validate preconditions before BEGIN; return Err without mutation
scenarios.required_persisted_observation: review_ledger_events unchanged after rejected command attempt
scenarios.required_reopen_recovery_step: optional reopen confirms unchanged canonical rows
scenarios.prohibited_shortcut: compare(before, before) self-oracle without persisted observation

scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: Reject stale active analysis selection; active_analysis_selection unchanged
Reject stale attachment set; analysis_results unchanged

scenarios.current_claim: Second writable open rejected with writer-already-open
scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: At most one authoritative writer; second attempt fails; canonical rows unchanged with independent persisted observation
scenarios.required_physical_operation: first writer holds lease; second open attempts ownership UPDATE and fails
scenarios.required_persisted_observation: canonical tables unchanged; independent reopen read
scenarios.required_reopen_recovery_step: 2C: process kill while first writer held; second process stale_takeover after lease expiry with integrity_check
scenarios.required_oracle: independent expected unchanged state, not compare(before,before)

scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: Fail closed writable when session_meta.format_version > CURRENT; exact error code
scenarios.required_persisted_observation: exact unsupported-newer-format error; no canonical mutation
scenarios.required_reopen_recovery_step: read-only salvage as separate future scenario if implemented
scenarios.required_oracle: error code assertion, not compare(fixture, fixture)

scenarios.current_claim: Canonical readable after derived artifact mutation; detection/rebuild not demonstrated
scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: Detect derived_cache corruption on open; rebuild derived; canonical tables unchanged
scenarios.required_physical_operation: UPDATE derived_cache; open detects corruption; rebuild derived row from canonical tables
scenarios.required_persisted_observation: canonical tables oracle-valid; derived row rebuilt
scenarios.required_reopen_recovery_step: close and reopen shows rebuilt derived artifact
scenarios.required_oracle: fixture canonical oracle; separate derived artifact assertion
scenarios.prohibited_shortcut: never consult derived artifact on open; treat canonical read alone as rebuild proof

scenarios.current_claim: Writable open fails on malformed JSON payload in legacy blob path
scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: Fail closed on canonical table corruption or deserialization failure with specific error; relational FK violations as separate future injector
scenarios.required_physical_operation: inject corruption into canonical table row or invalid FK; open(Writable) fails with canonical-corruption code
scenarios.required_persisted_observation: exact error classification; no silent open

scenarios.current_claim: Self-oracle on adapter-returned duplicate; fs::copy unsafe under WAL
scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: Online Backup duplication; new session_id; source unchanged after independent reopen; destination oracle-valid
scenarios.required_physical_operation: Backup API with source handle open; identity tx; destination finalize checkpoint; publish; reopen both sessions
scenarios.required_persisted_observation: destination session.db with distinct session_meta; source unchanged on reopen
scenarios.required_reopen_recovery_step: mandatory independent reopen of source and duplicate with new adapter instances
scenarios.required_oracle: independent expected from source state, not compare(duplicate, duplicate)
scenarios.package_ownership: 2B backup protocol unit tests (non-catalog, non-readiness); catalog semantic-duplication evidence and persisted oracle in 2C
scenarios.prohibited_shortcut: fs::copy(session.db); self-oracle; skip source unchanged verification

scenarios.current_claim: Logical pre-commit abort via simulated-durability-failure only
scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: Pre-commit abort leaves canonical unchanged; post-commit and post-ack faults in 2C
scenarios.required_physical_operation: BEGIN; mutate; fault before COMMIT; rollback
scenarios.required_persisted_observation: canonical tables match pre-command state after reopen
scenarios.package_ownership: 2B before_sqlite_commit hook; 2C after_commit and after_ack faults
scenarios.prohibited_shortcut: name recovery test but fault only before mutation begins

scenarios.current_claim: Pre-compaction logical interrupt only; no post-fault reopen
scenarios.future_sqlite_claim: VACUUM interrupt before mutation aborts; post-interrupt reopen shows last committed canonical state equivalent
scenarios.required_physical_operation: VACUUM or compaction entry; fault before rewrite completes
scenarios.required_persisted_observation: semantic oracle match pre-compaction after reopen
scenarios.prohibited_shortcut: compare(fixture, fixture) without compaction attempt observation
